headline: Trump Says Iranian Navy Is Decimated, Oil Prices Will Come Down
summary: President Trump said that Iran’s navy has been decimated and that as a result oil prices will come down. He described rising costs as “just a matter of war,” and said the conflict is going better than he thought it would.

headline: A Look At Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Valuation After New Cryo EM Center And Fungal Diagnostics Launch
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) is back in focus after opening a Cryo Electron Microscopy Drug Discovery Center in South San Francisco and rolling out new chromogenic media targeting drug resistant Candida auris. See our latest analysis for Thermo Fisher Scientific. Despite a steady stream of product launches and the new cryo EM Drug Discovery Center, Thermo Fisher Scientific’s 30 day share price return of 7.88% and year to date share price return of 15.60% point to fading momentum. headline: Drug Development Insights: What New Industry Data Reveals for 2026, Upcoming Webinar Hosted by Xtalks
summary: The future for drug developers is increasingly shaped by how effectively they adapt to complexity, change and rising pressure across the development landscape.
